SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS:
Applications must not exceed 15 pages total, excluding references and figures.

Budget Justification (3 pages maximum) - Personnel costs, equipment, and supplies
4.

Budget limit: $750,000 over 3 years for collaborative projects.

writing_related:
National Science Foundation Research Grant Program - Collaborative Research

SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS:
Applications must not exceed 15 pages total, excluding references and figures.
All text must be in 11-point Times New Roman font with 1-inch margins.

Project Summary (1 page maximum) - Executive overview of research objectives
2. Research Plan (10 pages maximum) - Detailed methodology and implementation approach  
3.

Budget Justification (3 pages maximum) - Personnel costs, equipment, and supplies
4.

Biographical Sketches (2 pages per PI) - CV and research experience

EVALUATION CRITERIA:
Proposals will be evaluated based on intellectual merit (60%) and broader impacts (40%).

SUBMISSION DEADLINE: March 31, 2025 at 5:00 PM EST
Budget limit: $750,000 over 3 years for collaborative projects.

FORMAT REQUIREMENTS:
- PDF format only for electronic submission
- File naming convention: LastName_ProjectTitle_2025.pdf  
- No page numbers in headers or footers
- Figures must be integrated within page limits

evaluation_criteria:
Biographical Sketches (2 pages per PI) - CV and research experience

EVALUATION CRITERIA:
Proposals will be evaluated based on intellectual merit (60%) and broader impacts (40%).
Applications evaluated by peer review panel of domain experts.
Review process considers innovation potential and methodological rigor.
